qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.oi_agente_caus oi_agente_caus, ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.c_agente_caus c_agente_caus, ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.d_agente_caus d_agente_caus FROM ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS ORDER BY ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.oi_agente_caus ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.AgentesCausantes.AGENTE_CAUS\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.oi_agente_caus oi_agente_caus FROM ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS ORDER BY ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.oi_agente_caus ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.AgentesCausantes.AGENTE_CAUS\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.AgentesCausantes.AGENTE_CAUS.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.AgentesCausantes.AGENTE_CAUS.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.oi_agente_caus) as CNT from ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.oi_agente_caus={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.d_agente_caus,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC03_AGENTES_CAUS.c_agente_caus,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
